# Template: docs/agents/skills-config.md

Write this after the setup interview. Record only decisions that were actually settled (by the user or by unambiguous evidence noted as such). Delete sections that do not apply. Replace `<version>` with this skill's current `metadata.version`.

This file is the argument the engine skills are called with: they read it before asking the user anything, and a decision recorded here is never re-asked.

---

```md
<!-- generated by setup v<version> -->

# Skills Config

Decisions from the setup interview. Engine skills (`bootstrap-agents-md`, `design-md`) read this file first; anything recorded here is settled — do not re-ask it. Re-run `setup` to revise a decision.

## Harness

- Target harness(es): <cursor | claude-code | both | other>
- Skills directory: <.agents/skills/ | other>
- CLAUDE.md strategy: <symlink | stub file>

## Docs

- Docs root: <docs/>
- Plans: <docs/plans/>
- Release notes: <docs/release.md | declined>

## Tracker

- Issue tracker: <github | linear | none>
- Conventions worth encoding: <branch naming, PR habits — or "none">

## Design

- Frontend detected: <yes (evidence) | no>
- design-md mode: <A document | B merge | C propose | declined>
- Direction (Mode C): <settled direction | "pending proposal approval">

## Domain

- CONTEXT.md: <seeded — terms confirmed in interview | declined>
- Head-only terms captured: <list | none>
```
